payload.answer: Duplicate Slack retry detected. No new memory committed.
citations: Input context: same Slack event ID delivered twice for 'Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans'.

entity_resolution.reason: Same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this retry should not create an additional durable memory entry.

details: Detected duplicate delivery of the same Slack event ID.
Suppressed re-processing to avoid duplicate durable memory.
No new memory cards were created from this retry.

repair_options: If the original event was not successfully persisted, replay it with a new idempotency check against storage state.
If duplicate detection is uncertain, verify whether a memory for this event ID already exists before committing.
